calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2010 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2010 Continued To Apr-20-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Chris Land, Esq. appeared with petitioner Jose Mercado, who was present as Guardian Ad Litem for the minor Janelle Ariscia Mercado, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $50,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $12,239.26.
Medical Expenses - $15,000.00.
Costs - $1,042.95.

The net balance of $21,717.79 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Chase Bank, located at 2800 Junipero Sera Boulevard, Daly City, CA 94105-1933. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-09-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Chris Land, Esq. appeared with petitioner Lisa Abagon, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minor Krystal Abagon, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $50,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $12,226.90.
Medical Expenses - $1,693.92.
Costs - $1,092.42.

The net balance of $34,986.76 shall be payed directly to Krystal Abagon, who turned eighteen (18) years of age on November 6, 2009.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
